d d!d"d#d$d%d&d'd(d)d*d+d,
d-d.d.d
d/d/d0d0d1d2d2d3d4d5d6d7d
d8d9d:d;d<d=d>d
)AzP
Finnish-language mappings for language-dependent features of
reStructuredText.
